value: Red Lamassu / Calypso APT (China-nexus, Sichuan/Chengdu) targeted telecommunications providers in Kazakhstan, Afghanistan, India, Azerbaijan and the Middle East from mid-2022 to 2026 using JFMBackdoor (Windows side-load via FLTLIB.dll under fltMC.exe) and Showboat / kworker (Linux post-exploitation framework). Disclosed in tandem by PwC TI and Lumen Black Lotus Labs on 2026-05-21.
context: high
confidence: PwC TI 2026-05-21 + Lumen Black Lotus Labs 2026-05-21
